title: Wandering Trader Notifier
description: Detects wandering traders that spawn nearby. /wtdconfig for the config menu. timing on servers is an estimate since there is no server side mod.
body:
**WANDERING TRADER NOTIFIER:**
- **/wtdconfig for the config menu**
- **uses an estimate on servers, resets estimate to spawn timing when first spawn occurs. unfortunately not possible on servers without server.side mod**
- **Join my discord to let me know of any improvements or mods that you want me to create next!**

By default, the WTDN hud will shows up at top right corner. The timer were set to depends on the game's tick rate, it will goes faster or slower based on it. A sound effect will be played if a Wandering Trader managed to spawn near you, press L to shut it down or if you had located the Wandering Trader

Description Credits: kusanagiichi, me
